column2: Trigger (XYZ)
column3: Action (ABC)

column2: Morgan Stanley raises AAPL price target to $315 for 2026.
column3: Long on dips; institutional "conviction" provides a floor at $240.

column2: iPhone 17 "Slim" (Sept 2025) sales data shows 20% higher ASP.
column3: Buy; higher "Average Selling Price" means better margins.

column2: Masimo patent dispute: Court denies import ban on Apple Watch.
column3: Long; the legal overhang that suppressed the stock is gone.

column2: China iPhone shipments rise 120% in Nov-Dec period.
column3: Long; the "China is dead" narrative was wrong; buy the reversal.

column2: Apple Intelligence (AI) launches a paid $19/mo "Pro" tier.
column3: Buy; Apple is finally a "Software-as-a-Service" (SaaS) giant.

column2: 50-Day Moving Average crosses below the 200-Day ("Death Cross").
column3: Short or exit; technical momentum has turned bearish.

column2: TSMC (Apple's chip maker) raises prices by 10%.
column3: Short AAPL; hardware margins will be compressed in Q3.

column2: Apple Vision Pro 2 is announced at a $1,999 price point.
column3: Long; the lower price point targets the "mass-market" luxury segment.

column2: EU mandates "Third-Party App Stores" across all devices globally.
column3: Short; the 30% "Apple Tax" revenue is under structural threat.

column2: Warren Buffett (Berkshire) sells another 10% of his AAPL stake.
column3: Wait; don't fight the "Oracle"; wait for the selling pressure to end.

column2: AAPL announces a record $100B share buyback.
column3: Buy; buybacks create "artificial" demand and boost EPS.

column2: Siri with LLM (Large Language Model) integration goes viral.
column3: Momentum Buy; "Cool factor" leads to higher hardware upgrades.

column2: Apple Glass (AR) prototypes leaked with "all-day" battery life.
column3: Buy the rumor; AR is the next decade's growth engine.

column2: Google is ordered to stop being the default search on Safari.
column3: Short; Apple loses $20B+ in "pure profit" annual payments.

column2: AAPL stock hits the "Fear & Greed" index low of 39.
column3: Contrarian Buy; when everyone is scared, it’s usually the bottom.

column2: New "Apple Bank" features (High-Yield Savings) hit $200B in AUM.
column3: Long; Apple is now a "Fintech" monster competing with Chase.

column2: iPhone production shifts 25% to India/Vietnam.
column3: Long; diversification reduces "China Geopolitical Risk" discount.

column2: AAPL fails to break out of the $270 resistance three times.
column3: Sell Calls; the stock is likely to trade sideways for a month.

column2: An "Executive Exit" (e.g., Jeff Williams) is announced.
column3: Short-term Sell; management stability is key to Apple's premium P/E.

column2: Apple Car project is "resurrected" as a robotaxi software play.
column3: Buy; it opens a multi-trillion dollar TAM (Total Addressable Market).
